name: Iter20 — 3D polish: data-tilt-enabled, card-sheen, score-puck visible on review page
description: After opening a review detail page, the review category cards must have data-tilt-enabled='true' for tilt micro-interactions, a card-sheen element inside each card for the CSS hover sweep, and the ScoreBar must show a score-puck element with a visible numeric score.

planSteps.description: Click the first review row to open the review detail page at /review/:id
Verify the review detail page loads at /review/:id with the full review report visible
Verify an element with the attribute data-tilt-enabled set to 'true' exists on the page — this is the tilt-enabled review card container
Verify an element with the CSS class card-sheen exists inside the review cards area — this is the glassmorphism light sweep overlay
Verify an element with the CSS class score-puck exists and shows a numeric score value between 0 and 100
Move the mouse cursor slowly over one of the review category cards
Verify the review card remains visible and the layout does not break during the hover interaction — no error messages, no blank sections
